basic_details.job_title: WCD Odisha Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 05 Anganwadi Worker and Anganwadi Helper Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Women & Child Development Department, Odisha (WCD Odisha)
basic_details.total_vacancies: Multiple vacancies across various districts/blocks (Exact total varies by block)
basic_details.short_information: Women & Child Development Department, Odisha (WCD Odisha) Anganwadi Worker and Anganwadi Helper Notification 2026 has been released under Advertisement No. WCD-6-MISC-0120-2023 / 5564 on the official website engagement-awc.odisha.gov.in. Multiple vacancies have been announced through the WCD Odisha Anganwadi Worker and Anganwadi Helper Recruitment 2026 across various districts and blocks of Odisha.

important_dates.raw: Online application window is open - 29/06/2026 Last Date For Online application - 13/07/2026

age_limit.age_details: As per revised guidelines (generally 18-40 years, relaxation applicable)

qualification.education_qualification: 10+2 / 12th Standard (for AWW); Relevant lower qualification for AWH
qualification.details: Qualification: Candidates must have passed 10+2 (12th Standard) for Anganwadi Worker. For Anganwadi Helper, minimum educational qualification as per norms. Other Requirements: Candidates should be local residents of the respective Gram Panchayat / Ward. Preference will be given as per revised guidelines. Age Limit: As per WCD Odisha Revised Guidelines.

vacancy_details.details: Vacancies are available for Anganwadi Worker (AWW) and Anganwadi Helper (AWH) posts in different blocks/districts of Odisha. Detailed block-wise vacancies are listed in the official notification.

salary_details.pay_scale: As per Government norms for Anganwadi Workers & Helpers

how_to_apply: Complete Public Login / New User Registration using Username & Password.
Fill the online application form carefully.
Upload required documents (Photo, Signature, Educational Certificates, Residence Proof, Caste Certificate etc.).
Submit the form and take a printout for future reference.
important_instructions: Candidates must upload original documents/certificates during application. Only online applications will be accepted. Selection will be based on eligibility criteria and merit as per guidelines. For detailed vacancy list and instructions, refer to the official notification.

content_sections.heading: WCD Odisha Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details
content_sections.text: Vacancies are available for Anganwadi Worker (AWW) and Anganwadi Helper (AWH) posts in different blocks/districts of Odisha. Detailed block-wise vacancies are listed in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: WCD Odisha Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Qualification : Candidates must have passed 10+2 (12th Standard) for Anganwadi Worker. For Anganwadi Helper, minimum educational qualification as per norms. Other Requirements : Candidates should be local residents of the respective Gram Panchayat / Ward. Preference will be given as per revised guidelines. Age Limit : As per WCD Odisha Revised Guidelines.

content_sections.heading: WCD Odisha Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
content_sections.text: Online application window is open - 29/06/2026 Last Date For Online application - 13/07/2026

content_sections.heading: WCD Odisha Recruitment 2026 - How to Apply
content_sections.text: Visit the official website: https://engagement-awc.odisha.gov.in Complete Public Login / New User Registration using Username & Password. Fill the online application form carefully. Upload required documents (Photo, Signature, Educational Certificates, Residence Proof, Caste Certificate etc.). Submit the form and take a printout for future reference.

content_sections.heading: WCD Odisha Recruitment 2026 - General Information / Instructions
content_sections.text: Candidates must upload original documents/certificates during application. Only online applications will be accepted. Selection will be based on eligibility criteria and merit as per guidelines. For detailed vacancy list and instructions, refer to the official notification.

content_sections.heading: WCD Odisha Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the official website for WCD Odisha Anganwadi Worker & Helper Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official application portal is http://engagement-awc.odisha.gov.in.

faq.question: Q2. Who can apply for Anganwadi Worker posts in Odisha?
faq.answer: Local residents who have passed 10+2 and meet the age & residency criteria as per revised guidelines.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for WCD Odisha AWW AWH Recruitment?
faq.answer: Application fee details are not specified in the notification (generally Nil for such posts).

faq.question: Q4. What documents are required for WCD Odisha Anganwadi online application?
faq.answer: Photo, Signature, 10th/12th certificates, Residence Certificate, Caste Certificate (if applicable), and other relevant documents.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for Anganwadi Worker and Helper?
faq.answer: Selection is based on merit, educational qualification, and local residency as per WCD guidelines.

faq.question: Q6. How to check block-wise vacancies for WCD Odisha Recruitment?
faq.answer: Log in to the official portal or refer to the detailed notification PDF for block/district-wise vacancy lists.
